xPosts.content: I think it's clear that for many smaller companies that invested in deep learning, it turned out
xPosts.highlights: Chollet suggests that deep learning investments haven't paid off for many smaller companies, implying practical limitations or misalignment with business needs.
xPosts.worthReading: This offers a critical perspective on the real-world ROI of deep learning for smaller organizations.
